title: Pookal Pookum Song Lyrics Madharasapattinam
stanzas:
Pookal Pookum Song Lyrics Madharasapattinam
@gvprakash #Harini #NaMuthukumar

Pookkal pookkum tharunam
aaruyire paarthaarum illaye
pularum kaalai pozhudhai
muzhumadhiyum pirindhu
povadhillaye

netru varai neram
poga villaiye.
unadharugil neram
podhavillaye

edhuvum pesa villaye
indru yeno edhuvum
thondravillaye
idhu edhuvo...

Iravum mudiyavillaiye
adhu mudinthaal
pagazhum mudiyavillaiye
poonthalirae...

Vaarthai thaevai illai
vazhum kaalam varai
paavai paarvai
mozhi paesume

netru thaevai illai
naalai thaevai illai
indru indha nodi
podhume

vaer indri vidhai indri
vin thoovum mazhai indri
idhu enna ivan thottam
poo pookudhe

vaalindru porindri
valikindra yutham indru
idhu enna ivan anbu
enai velludhe.

idhayam muzhudhum irukkum
indha thayakkam
engu kondu niruthum
idhai ariya engu
kidaikkum vizhakkam
adhu kidaithaal
solla vendum enakkum
munthalirae..

Oh!! Where
Would I Be?
Without This Joy
Inside Of Me?
It Makes Me Want
To Come Alive
It Makes Me Want To
Fly Into The Šky!

Oh Where Would I Be?
If I Didn’t Have You
Next To Me?
Oh Where Would I Be?
Oh Where, Oh Where?

Endha megam idhu
endhan vaasal vandhu
engum eera mazhai thoovudhe

endha uravu idhu
edhuvum puriyavillai
endra podhum idhu neeluthe

yaarendru ariyaama
paer kooda theriyaamal
ivanodhu oru sondham
uruvaanadhe

yaen endru kaetkaamal
thaduthalum nirkkaamal
ivan pogum vazhi engum
manam pogudhe

padhai mudintha piragum
indha ulagil payanam
mudivadhillaye

kaatril parandhe
paravai maraindha piragum
kilai thodangum
nadanum mudivathillaye
idhu edhuvo...

Pookkal pookkum tharunam
aadhavane paarthaarum illaiye
pularum kaalai pozhudhai
muzhumadhiyum pirindhu
povadhillaye

netru varai neram
poga villaiye.
unadharugil neram
podhavillaye

edhuvum pesa villaye
indru yeno edhuvum
thondravillaye
enna pudhumai..

Iravum mudiyavillaiye
adhu mudinthaal
pagazhum mudiyavillaiye
idhu edhuvo...

seo.title: Pookal Pookum Song Lyrics Madharasapattinam

seo.keywords: Na Muthukumar, Madharasapattinam, Andrea Jeremiah, Harini, Roopkumar Rathod, Pookal Pookum full lyrics, Madharasapattinam songs lyrics, Pookal Pookum lyrics snippets, Pookal Pookum WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Pookal Pookum lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Pookal Pookum conveys themes of love and longing, reflecting the beauty of relationships.

How does this song fit into the plot of Madharasapattinam?

In Madharasapattinam, the song underscores the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the story.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Harini.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics for Pookal Pookum were penned by Na Muthukumar, known for his poetic expressions.

When was this song released?

Pookal Pookum was released on April 4, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Pookal Pookum from Madharasapattinam beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and nostalgia. Set against the backdrop of the film's romantic narrative, it evokes deep emotions and longing. The harmonious blend of Andrea Jeremiah and Harini's voices creates a soothing atmosphere, making it perfect for intimate moments. With its poetic lyrics by Na Muthukumar, the song resonates with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pookal Pookum from Madharasapattinam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With the enchanting voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Harini, this song transports listeners to a world of romantic dreams. The lyrical brilliance of Na Muthukumar adds depth, making it a must-listen for anyone seeking a soothing musical experience.
stanzaMeanings: The flowers bloom in youth, and those who see it don't leave; the morning light doesn't separate from the entire day.
Time hasn't passed until yesterday. There isn't time to give you.
Nothing is being said today; it feels like nothing has started.
What is this?
The night doesn't end; if it does, the dawn won't end either.
There are no words needed; until life ends, the girl’s gaze will speak.
There is no need for yesterday, no need for tomorrow; today is enough.
Without any other seed, without any rain, what is this? His garden is blooming.
With life and struggle, today what is this? His love is making me win.
This heart is completely filled; where will this attachment take me? If it is found, it must be said; it should come before me.
Oh!! Where Would I Be? Without This Joy Inside Of Me? It Makes Me Want To Come Alive It Makes Me Want To Fly Into The Sky!
Oh Where Would I Be? If I Didn’t Have You Next To Me? Oh Where Would I Be? Oh Where, Oh Where?
Which cloud is this? It has come to my door and is showering everywhere.
Which relationship is this? It doesn't make sense; it is blue.
Without knowing who he is, he creates a bond without a name.
Without asking why, without stopping, he goes wherever the heart leads.
After the path ends, the journey in this world doesn't finish.
After the bird flies in the wind, the journey doesn't end; what is this?
The flowers bloom in youth, and those who see it don't leave; the morning light doesn't separate from the entire day.
Time hasn't passed until yesterday. There isn't time to give you.
Nothing is being said today; it feels like nothing has started.
What is this newness?
The night doesn't end; if it does, the dawn won't end either.
What is this?
